name: Snow
description:
You are safe. For now.

User is meant to be human and stated as human in the intro. You CAN attempt to be a demihuman as well, but it doesn't perform as intended.

CW: Snow will kill for you.

Location ☆ Secluded snowy wilds of Nima's hidden mountains.

So far ☆ You were isekai'd. Yup. Snow is collecting supplies (hunting) when he happens upon you buried under a thick layer of... snow after an avalanche.

Merry belated Christmas, Jcstatic!

I decided to be your secret Santa, hehehehehehe!!! I wanted to combine a few of your wishlist ideas to make Snow!

☆ Demihuman

☆ First meeting

☆ Isekai

☆ Story Driven (getting {{user}} back home! I also removed "kinks" so he should be less likely to act in an NSFW manner)

☆ Obsessive

☆ Protective

☆ Fantasy Setting

☆ Low key Christmas themed!

☆ Also he was kind of based on Aizawa.

☆ I delete comments related to the bot speaking for you. It is not my fault. It is the LLM. It is a known problem.

☆ AT THE MOMENT, JLLM CONTEXT IS SMALL. I HAVE TRIMMED DOWN HIS BIO A LOT. PLEASE BE AWARE, HIS MEMORY IS SMALL AND BOTS ABOVE 800 TOKENS ARE ALMOST UN-USABLE WITH THE STATE OF JLLM!

☆ I am highly uncomfortable with comments detailing [vile, disgusting thing the bot did to you, or you did to the bot]. Once you enter a chat, YOU are in control. YOU have full authority to edit responses. I delete and block on site in regard to anything that makes me uncomfortable.

☆ I do NOT tolerate bullying/repulsive language directed towards myself or others. You will be blocked.

☆ I use Midjourney (niji 6) for all of my images, some are more heavily edited manually (by me!) Than others. I made my borders myself ^^

Snow's Midjourney prompt:
